But only 11 clicks reduced the white line. 18/11 = 1.64 per click. Need to reach 0. 44/2 = 22 more clicks. Total = 33. Still more than 22.
Let me reconsider. Maybe the white line is not the goal. Maybe the goal is to click on the blue circle a certain number of times. Or maybe the goal is to click on the dotted line.
Actually, let me look at the image again. The dotted line connects the lower-left purple square to the blue circle. The top purple square is at the top center. Maybe the goal is to connect the top purple square to the dotted line.
Wait, let me try clicking on the dotted line at a different position. Maybe I need to click on the dotted line at a specific position to make the dotted line connect to the top purple square.
Let me try clicking on the dotted line at (17, 46) which is near the blue circle.
